aboutText: I am a **product-focused full-stack engineer** with 6+ years of experience building web applications that balance performance, accessibility, and maintainability. I enjoy working across the stack, from crafting intuitive frontend experiences in React and Next.js to designing reliable backend services and data flows. Recently, I have been focused on **developer experience**, **design systems**, and shipping features with clear business impact.

experiences.description: Leading delivery of customer-facing SaaS features, improving page performance, and mentoring a small frontend guild. Reduced average release cycle time by introducing stronger CI checks and reusable UI patterns.
Built and maintained a component-driven platform used across multiple client products. Collaborated with design and product teams to improve accessibility and consistency across releases.
Developed dashboards and internal tooling for analytics workflows, including ingestion pipelines and reporting interfaces for operations and finance teams.

featuredProjects.name: Finlytics Dashboard
featuredProjects.summary: A multi-tenant analytics dashboard for subscription metrics, cohort tracking, and churn prediction with role-based reporting.

featuredProjects.name: SupportIQ Assistant
featuredProjects.summary: Internal support workspace that unifies customer context, knowledge base search, and response templates to reduce resolution time.

featuredProjects.name: Studio Design System
featuredProjects.summary: A shared UI system with tokens, components, and documentation used across multiple product squads.
